note: PRD with 20 requirements across 5 categories, 4 PR decomposition, acceptance criteria
7 TUI UX patterns: mouse, search, code rendering, progress, config, themes, export + Ink v5 constraints
TuiState + TuiAction definitions — add new actions for cancel, search, symbolMode toggle, export
Centralized keyboard shortcuts — add Ctrl+C confirm, Ctrl+S search, Ctrl+E expand all
Symbol mode system — consolidate hardcoded emoji/unicode into this module
Root layout + global keyboard handler — add Ctrl+C confirmation, task cancel, search mode
Message log — add search highlight, code syntax highlighting, diff coloring
Subtask overlay — add scrolling when content exceeds terminal height
Task list overlay — add scrolling when content exceeds terminal height
Status bar — add focus indicator enhancement, task complete notification
Spinner/progress — wire Esc cancel to actually cancel task submission
Markdown rendering — add cli-highlight for code blocks, cache renderer by width
